scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @ebookstore/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:smoke:admin-users: npm run db:migrate:deploy --workspace @ebookstore/api && RUN_DATABASE_SMOKE_TESTS=1 vitest run apps/api/src/admin-users/admin-users.smoke.test.ts
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ebookstore/contracts && npm run build --workspace @ebookstore/api
scripts.test:smoke:catalog-integrity: npm run db:migrate:deploy --workspace @ebookstore/api && RUN_DATABASE_SMOKE_TESTS=1 vitest run apps/api/src/catalog/catalog-integrity.smoke.test.ts
